discussion_comments.comment_body: The changes here are not logically equivalent
they are equivalent. see this [CodeSandbox](https://codesandbox.io/s/stupefied-http-l3v0p) console output
maybe some unit tests would be in order 😉

commented_code:
// Do we need to retry the request?
         if (
-          // Only retry if the document is visible
           query.config.retry === true ||
-          query.state.failureCount <= query.config.retry
+          (typeof query.config.retry == 'number' &&
+            query.state.failureCount <= query.config.retry) ||
+          query.config.retry(query.state.failureCount, error)

discussion_comments.comment_body: We need to check if retry is a function before calling it
